headline: The Year in Charts, quiz edition
body_text:
Whatever else you might want to say about 2024, it was definitely one (1) calendar year.

Here are some mystery charts about it! Get all six correct and you’ll get a special holiday prize. Let us know if you DON’T want us to use your name.

This is an extra-long holiday quiz, so email us by daybreak in London — to the extent that day “breaks” in the UK this time of year — on January 6.

See you all on the other side!
